name: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct
tagline: a cassette you can chat with
license_evidence: HF API cardData.license = 'apache-2.0' (verified via https://huggingface.co/api/models/HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct). Apache-2.0 is permissive; no per-file LICENSE in repo tree but the model card declares apache-2.0. Tokenizer (GPT-2 BPE merges) ships with the model under the same terms.
arch: LlamaForCausalLM, hidden=576, layers=30, heads=9, kv_heads=3, vocab=49152, tied embeddings, bf16
quant: int8 / int4 / int3 (symmetric group-wise, group=64, per-group fp16 scale; every 2-D tensor incl. embed_tokens/lm_head quantized, 1-D norms kept fp16)
runtime: transformers.js (q4f16) WASM in-browser, or llama.cpp/llama2.c int4 dequant-on-load. Manifest gives per-tensor woff/wlen + scale offsets for group-wise symmetric dequant. NOT built to WASM here (runtime path noted only).
honest_assessment: int4 (60.5 MB, 12% per-group rel err) is the safe shippable quant for coherent chat. int3 (45.4 MB, 28% rel err) is the most-aggressive pack and roundtrips cleanly shape-wise, but 28% weight error is borderline for instruct coherence and still 11.4 MB OVER the ~34 MB dream tier. Embeddings+lm_head (49152x576 = 28M of 134M params) dominate; reaching 34 MB would need vocab pruning or int2 (not attempted). NONE of the quants fit the ~34 MB dream tier. xz barely helps (quantized weights are near-random bytes).
